payload:
# UI/UX Cutover & Revamp

## Objective

Big-bang cutover of the entire UI layer to shadcn-ui components on a dedicated branch. Mobile-first PWA, light-only, primary teal retained. ~280 files, 14 steps.

## Key Requirements

- Reset all 47 shadcn primitives to latest via `npx shadcn@latest add --overwrite`
- Remove `motion` dependency, migrate 9 files to CSS animations (tailwindcss-animate)
- Remove dark mode (`.dark` block in globals.css, `dark:` variants)
- Replace all hardcoded hex/rgba with C... [truncated, 3911 chars total]
Committed 100 files of UI/UX cutover work (dark mode removal, accent fix, semantic tokens). Remaining: logo orange fix, lint errors assessment.
Logo orange gradient replaced with teal (#5EEAD4/#2DD4BF). All cutover tasks complete.

UI/UX cutover complete. All acceptance criteria verified: no loading text, no motion dep, no .dark block, no orange in design system, logo updated to teal. 102 lint errors are pre-existing in test files (noNonNullAssertion), not from cutover scope.

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

## Summary
- Iterations: 3
- Duration: 9m 13s
- Exit code: 0
